mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO note (user_id, title, content, images, tags, location, stable_random, status, like_count, comment_count, favorite_count, view_count, forward_count) VALUES
(#{note.userId}, #{note.title}, #{note.content}, #{note.images}, #{note.tags}, #{note.location}, #{note.stableRandom}, #{note.status}, #{note.likeCount}, #{note.commentCount}, #{note.favoriteCount}, #{note.viewCount}, #{note.forwardCount})
